dsl_rule.translation_notes: Tall lower shadow approximated as lower_wick > 0.0025 (median 0.25-0.36% of breakout price). Heavy breakout-day volume represented as volume > hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility benchmark). Direction is context-dependent (bullish or bearish breakout). Exit uses simple reversal logic since author provided no explicit exit rules. Stop loss set conservatively at 5.5% based on observed decline ranges (-5.43% to -9.64%). Hold period set to ~21 days (3 weeks) as reasonable default. Pattern applies to both bull and bear market regimes.

source_rule_text: Candlestick patterns with tall lower shadows outperform those with short lower shadows; heavy breakout-day volume suggests better performance
